persistent@test.com.title: International Sports Federation Announces Major Rule Changes
persistent@test.com.description: The international governing body for athletics announces sweeping rule changes that will reshape competitive sports.
persistent@test.com.content: In a landmark decision, the International Athletics Federation has announced comprehensive rule changes affecting competition formats and eligibility criteria.

persistent@test.com.title: Breakthrough in Renewable Energy Storage Could Revolutionize Grid
persistent@test.com.description: Scientists announce a major advancement in battery technology that could make renewable energy storage 10x more efficient.
persistent@test.com.content: A team of international researchers has unveiled a new battery technology that dramatically improves energy storage efficiency for renewable sources.
